title: Remove overdue idle post-hold cron duplicates and fail closed in scheduler
goal: Protect the first truthful post-hold marketing slot by removing overdue one-shot cron duplicates and preventing them from surviving future reschedules.
shared_findings_reused: openclaw cron list: stale overdue marketing-measurement-hold-release job 80efd280-69cb-4d92-b0e6-8795a96ecebb was still present alongside the current 2026-05-26T13:14:38 wake

changes.summary: Measurement-hold cron reconciliation now keeps overdue idle one-shot jobs in the conflict set so reschedules remove them instead of silently ignoring them. Current-run lookup also prefers a future/running wake over stale overdue leftovers.
Added regression coverage for overdue idle cron removal and for preferring the future wake over a stale overdue duplicate.

result: Live cron state now shows only one marketing-measurement-hold-release job, aligned with the current re-entry contract.

current_truth.execution_board_state: no truthful do-now handoff packet exists before the short review window clears
current_truth.next_best_effect: The scheduled post-hold rerun now has a single truthful wake instead of a duplicate overdue one-shot that could blur or steal the slot.
